issues.description: SearchDeck is incorrect; should be PlayFromHand or SearchDeck with destination 'hand', then PlayFromHand. The effect plays from hand or trash, not searches deck.
Filter missing cost constraint (≤7). Should include maxCost:7.

RemoveLife is wrong. Effect says 'trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card' — this means reduce life to 1, not remove 1 life. Should use FlipLife or equivalent to set life to 1.
Second effect (Trigger with DrawCard and TrashFromHand) has no basis in card text. The Main effect only describes playing Enel and trashing life cards; no draw or discard mechanics exist.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Play up to 1 [Enel] with a cost of 7 or less from your hand or trash. Then, trash cards from the top of your Life cards until you have 1 Life card.
